text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Crazy. Was the Droit always such a huge event?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
No! This year was the biggest it's ever been! And I think our dance
had something to do with that.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You really think so? Hold on, are you sure it's okay for the
ever-popular Fuji to be out here right now?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
If I remember right, you've got a closing speech to give. You've got it
rough, huh?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I thought I'd get some air before that. And I hope you realize you're
just as popular. All your friends were looking for you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'd rather avoid being made fun of... But if you came to give your
thanks, I'm all ears.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I knew you were sharp. You still don't have a grasp on how I
really feel though.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Sky... for being my date.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't mistaken about you. You were the ultimate trickster. The
cheers were proof of that.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Our dance became a wonderful memory for everyone there. Hehe,
thank you so much. I'm sorry I wouldn't take no for an answer.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
No need to apologize. I'm the one who accepted your deal. And you
probably...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, you got to know all about Shakur's peculiar skills and all.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I really need to thank her as well. I have a feeling I'll be
organizing quite a few scrimmages starting next week.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, I bet my adorable ponies are starting to worry. I should head
back.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, right. There was something I wanted to tell you too.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Lend me your ear...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: U-uh?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Your dress... looks beautiful on you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I had trouble telling you because... you really do resemble a goddess.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Fooled you good! ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Another big surprise in the bag. Phew, I really wanted to get even
after you sucked me into all this, so I went with the cool, suave
approach. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
With that said, isn't it about time? Good luck with your speech. See
ya! ☆

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...What a shock. Hehe, you didn't need to do that if you're going to
get embarrassed about it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: (But it seems like she's really feeling better. I'm glad.)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
(Being the leader of another dorm, I was afraid of stepping in too
much. But I couldn't help it seeing the state she was in.)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
All right. It wasn't a real date, but I got my compliment. Nothing left
but to give a spectacular speech.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've announced this evening's "best couple," it's time to
close out the night!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hello, everyone. Did you all enjoy this year's Ligne Droite? For some
of you, it was your first time... For others, it was perhaps your last.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
All of us, though, will always be striving forward. And wherever we
may go, every day we'll be running until both our bodies and our
hearts are worn out.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That's what we chose, and we'll never stop chasing after our dreams.
But the next time you think you can't take another step... remember
this night.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You, the runner next to you... You're all running down your own paths
in life. Remember that each and every one of you is beautiful... and
the star of your own story.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Only you can run down that final stretch. So follow your heart, dash
ahead... and cross the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I knew it... I'm just not the right match for Fuji. I can't... match that
beauty.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'll get you back for making me dance to your tune... my dear date.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I sense a big hassle approaching. But since I'm so close to
thinking up a new racing strategy, I guess I'll have to...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Run away! ♪
